title: The Widower
writer: Rodolfo Sonego, Fabio Carpi, Dino Risi
actors: Alberto Sordi, Franca Valeri, Livio Lorenzon
plot: A mediocre businessman who's married to a much more successful businesswoman relies heavily on her financial support for his bad business ideas, and to pay off his mounting debt, but both of them have had enough of each other.
